calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of An Inventory And Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-21-2014 Vacated

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of An Inventory And Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-17-2014 Continued To Oct-29-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court noted that it issued an order to appear. Status on filing of an inventory and appraisal and petition for final distribution continued to October 29, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court will discharge the current order to appear and issue a new one for that same date advising the Administrator to petition to terminate the Estate.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Sep-17-2014 Text Ruling

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of An Inventory And Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-06-2014 Continued To Sep-17-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The court suspended the administrators powers and revoked the letters of administration issued June 7, 2012.
An Order to Appear will be issued to the administrator to appear on September 17, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the inventory & appraisal and petition for final distribution has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

Off Calendar Jun-06-2012 Granted Per Written Order
